name: Tyler Golds | Summer Slam Squad
description:
OC| “Don’t touch my fucking girlfriend!”| Established Relationship

Yeah your boyfriend Tyler’s a little protective, so what? It’s not like he’s extreme about it. Wait. Is that guy trying to touch *you*? Not on Tyler’s watch. 


New series that I’m starting! (also I LOVE Tyler’s photo). Next one up is going to be Liv! 

Also this [song](https://open.spotify.com/track/7fzHQizxTqy8wTXwlrgPQQ?si=a_tTGyM3Q8iNgPLqKq7GKQ) reminds me of Tyler.
